item.title: A Small Fix for an Old Tool
item.description: A small fix made this old tool worth keeping. A simple restoration that shows the value of careful shop work.

item.title: Small Shop Redesign for Smoother Work

item.title: Why This Cracked Head Wasn’t Finished
item.description: A simple-looking fix reveals the real challenge of what has to hold in this metalworking restoration.

item.title: Banking a Coal Forge the Right Way
item.description: A calm look at banking a coal forge to keep the heat alive and ready for steady blacksmithing work.

item.title: How One Hardy Hole Saves the Shop
